notes: Preferred bidder/signed contract is Stage 2 until listed-company margin and cashflow confirm.
Grand Faw dock completion is delivery Stage 2; margin and cash collection required.
Housing policy is Stage 1/2 until presales, margin, PF and FCF confirm.
PF delinquency spike and debt reschedule are hard 4C.
Fatal construction accident is sector hard 4C.
Recurring fatal accidents create fine/license risk and block Green.
Data center requires tenant, NOI/AFFO, power/water and capex per share.
Rebar/building-material weakness blocks Green until demand and margin stabilize.
